problem_text_cn: 3-33 如图3-37所示，质量$2m$的小环套在水平光滑的固定细杆上，并用长$l$的轻线与质量为$m$的小球相连。今将轻线沿水平拉直，使小球从与环等高处由静止释放，试问当轻线与水平杆夹角为$\theta$时线中张力$T$为多大？
problem_text_en: 3-33 As shown in Figure 3-37, a ring of mass $2m$ slides on a horizontal smooth fixed thin rod, and is connected by a light string of length $l$ to a small ball of mass $m$. The string is initially pulled horizontally taut, and the ball is released from rest at the same height as the ring. When the string makes an angle $\theta$ with the horizontal rod, determine the tension $T$ in the string.
problem_solution_cn:
解 $\theta$角方位时运动量已在图3-38中给出，有
$$ v_{x}=2u, $$
$$ \frac{1}{2}m(v_{x}^{2}+v_{y}^{2})+\frac{1}{2}(2m)u^{2}=mgl\sin\theta, $$
$$ v_{x}+u=v_{y}\tan\theta, $$
由此可得
$$ v_{x}^{2}=\frac{8gl\sin\theta}{3(2+3\cot^{2}\theta)}, $$
$$ v_{y}=\frac{3}{2}v_{x}\cot\theta, $$
$$ u=\frac{1}{2}v_{x}. $$
将小球相对小环速度记为$v'$，则有
$$ v'^{2}=(v_{x}+u)^{2}+v_{y}^{2}=\frac{6gl}{(2+3\cot^{2}\theta)\sin\theta}. $$
小环向右加速度$a_{0}$与线中张力$T$的关系为
$$ 2ma_{0}=T\cos\theta, \qquad\text{①} $$
小球相对小环的动力学方程为
$$ T+ma_{0}\cos\theta-mg\sin\theta=\frac{mv'^{2}}{l}, \qquad\text{②} $$
联立①、②可解得
$$ T=\frac{2(8+\cos^{2}\theta)}{\sin\theta(2+\cos^{2}\theta)(2+3\cot^{2}\theta)}mg. $$
problem_solution_en:
Solution The kinematic quantities at angle $\theta$ are given in Figure 3-38. We have
$$ v_{x}=2u, $$
$$ \frac{1}{2}m(v_{x}^{2}+v_{y}^{2})+\frac{1}{2}(2m)u^{2}=mgl\sin\theta, $$
$$ v_{x}+u=v_{y}\tan\theta, $$
from which we obtain
$$ v_{x}^{2}=\frac{8gl\sin\theta}{3(2+3\cot^{2}\theta)}, $$
$$ v_{y}=\frac{3}{2}v_{x}\cot\theta, $$
$$ u=\frac{1}{2}v_{x}. $$
Let the velocity of the ball relative to the ring be $v'$; then
$$ v'^{2}=(v_{x}+u)^{2}+v_{y}^{2}=\frac{6gl}{(2+3\cot^{2}\theta)\sin\theta}. $$
The rightward acceleration of the ring, $a_{0}$, is related to the tension $T$ by
$$ 2ma_{0}=T\cos\theta, \qquad\text{①} $$
and the dynamical equation of the ball relative to the ring is
$$ T+ma_{0}\cos\theta-mg\sin\theta=\frac{mv'^{2}}{l}, \qquad\text{②} $$
Solving ① and ② together gives
$$ T=\frac{2(8+\cos^{2}\theta)}{\sin\theta(2+\cos^{2}\theta)(2+3\cot^{2}\theta)}mg. $$
img_cn: 图3-37：质量$2m$的小环套在水平光滑的固定细杆上，用长$l$的轻线连接质量$m$的小球，轻线初始水平拉直。
图3-38：当轻线与水平杆夹角为$\theta$时，系统运动示意图。标注了小球速度分量$v_x$、$v_y$，小环速度$u$，并给出速度关系$v_x=2u$，$v_x+u=v_y\tan\theta$。
img_en: Figure 3-37: A ring of mass $2m$ slides on a horizontal smooth fixed thin rod; it is connected by a light string of length $l$ to a small ball of mass $m$. Initially the string is pulled horizontally taut.

Figure 3-38: Schematic of the system motion when the string makes an angle $\theta$ with the horizontal rod. The velocity components of the ball $v_x$, $v_y$, and the velocity of the ring $u$ are indicated, with the relations $v_x=2u$, $v_x+u=v_y\tan\theta$.
